isolation.parallelWorkers: isolated process-level tests - no shared state

assertions.title: Terminal states remain absorbing under all representative ingress events

steps.action: Run reducer.test.ts - property-based test for terminal state absorption
steps.expected: Terminal states (done, stopped, terminated) should not change under any event
steps.observed: Test 'terminal states are absorbing — no event changes them' passed with 100 property-based iterations

steps.action: Verify effects array is empty for terminal state events
steps.observed: All events on terminal states produce zero effects

evidence.testName: terminal states are absorbing — no event changes them

assertions.title: Global stop/pr-close transitions preempt active states correctly

steps.action: Test stop_requested transitions from all non-terminal states
steps.expected: All non-terminal states should transition to 'stopped' with publish_status effect
steps.observed: Property-based test 'stop_requested always reaches stopped from any non-terminal state' passed

steps.action: Test pr_closed transitions from all non-terminal states
steps.expected: All non-terminal states should transition to 'terminated' with publish_status effect
steps.observed: Property-based test 'pr_closed always reaches terminated from any non-terminal state' passed

steps.action: Verify terminal states remain unchanged by stop/pr_close
steps.observed: Terminal state tests confirmed absorbing behavior

testNames: stop_requested always reaches stopped from any non-terminal state
pr_closed always reaches terminated from any non-terminal state
evidence.testCount: All preempt tests passed across 8 non-terminal states

assertions.title: Out-of-order/stale run and gate signals are no-ops

steps.action: Test stale run_completed signal with mismatched runId
steps.expected: State unchanged, activeRunId preserved, no effects emitted
steps.observed: Test 'stale terminal run signals do not consume the active lease' passed - state remained 'implementing', activeRunId stayed 'run-current'

steps.expected: Gate verdicts with wrong runSeq should be no-ops
steps.observed: Test 'mismatched runSeq gate verdicts are no-ops' passed - gating_review state unchanged

steps.expected: dispatch_acked never changes state regardless of runId match
steps.observed: Property test 'dispatch_acked never changes state' passed for all states with/without activeRunId

testNames: stale terminal run signals do not consume the active lease
mismatched runSeq gate verdicts are no-ops

assertions.title: Reducer invariants remain valid after each transition

steps.action: Run property-based invariant tests with random event sequences
steps.expected: Invariants must hold: activeGate matches state, activeRunId only in dispatch-coherent states, version never decreases, effects is array
steps.observed: contracts.test.ts (19 tests) and reducer.test.ts invariant tests all passed

steps.expected: activeGate must be 'review' for gating_review, 'ci' for gating_ci, null otherwise
steps.observed: Property test 'activeGate always matches state' passed across all random sequences
Property test 'activeRunId is null outside dispatch-coherent states' passed

steps.expected: version >= previous version after each transition

assertions.title: Legacy compatibility normalization preserves canonical behavior

steps.expected: Legacy state should normalize to 'implementing' on dispatch events
steps.observed: Test 'legacy awaiting_implementation_acceptance heads normalize into implementing' passed

steps.action: Verify legacy dispatch_sent events are no-ops
steps.expected: dispatch_sent in planning/gating_review should not change state (legacy migration artifact)
steps.observed: Tests 'planning dispatch_sent is a legacy no-op' and 'gating_review dispatch_sent is a legacy no-op' passed

steps.action: Test BRANCH_CASES for legacy transition handling
steps.expected: All legacy branch cases should normalize correctly
steps.observed: All 15 BRANCH_CASES in transition-contract.ts executed correctly

testNames: planning dispatch_sent is a legacy no-op
gating_review dispatch_sent is a legacy no-op

summary: All 5 assertions passed (5/5). Tested 564 total assertions across 4 test files. The v3 reducer transition core correctly handles: (1) terminal state absorption, (2) global preempt transitions, (3) stale signal filtering, (4) invariant preservation, and (5) legacy compatibility normalization.
